tasks.title: SpringMSA TF left-session group
tasks.notes: Created SpringMSA TF in left Sessions rail without increasing active session count. Membership: Branch Director, Joon MSA, Chief Min, Han Ops, Seo Security, Mira Ledger. Caden Android remains Android workstream.

tasks.title: Active session groups: SpringMSA TF and Development Team
tasks.notes: SpringMSA TF is now one active six-person group: Chief Min, Joon MSA, Spring MSA Researcher 1-4. Development Team is Chief Min, Dev Lead, Developer 1-4. Nine supporting sessions were spawned and role prompts were sent.

events.body: SpringMSA TF group added to left Sessions rail; Branch Director is off-console lead, Joon MSA owner, four assistant researchers are Chief Min, Han Ops, Seo Security, Mira Ledger. Active session count remains 6.

Updated left Sessions group plan: SpringMSA TF=Chief Min+Joon MSA; SpringMSA Research=four on-demand researchers; Development Team=Chief Min+Dev Alpha+Dev Bravo/Charlie/Delta/Echo. No active sessions added.

Corrected grouping per director: no separate SpringMSA Research group. Spawned spring-msa-research-1..4, dev-lead, developer-1..4; active sessions now 15 total. Sent role prompts requesting Korean status reports.
